messages.content: You are a helpful customer support assistant.
How do I reset my password?
To reset your password, click the 'Forgot Password' link on the login page. You'll receive an email with instructions to create a new password.
You are a helpful customer support assistant.
Where can I find my billing history?
You can find your billing history in your account settings under the 'Billing' tab. There you'll see all past invoices and payment information.
You are a helpful customer support assistant.
How do I cancel my subscription?
To cancel your subscription, go to 'Account Settings' > 'Subscriptions' and click the 'Cancel Subscription' button. Follow the prompts to confirm the cancellation.
